running_gpu_jobs.args: lam in [0,1,5,10] seed=42 (4-job pilot, 1 per GPU sequentially)

experiments: R14.E multi-seed CORAL probe (R13_coral_probe.py, expanded): 4 λ × 3 seeds = 12 CORAL + 2 MMD configs harvested. CORAL λ=1 corrected n=68 LR per-seed [0.791, 0.714, 0.624], mean 0.71 ± 0.08; disease AUC 0.933 ± 0.001 across all λ. CORAL beats corrected-GRL R11 0.80 floor by 0.10 AUC with disease preserved. MMD λ=5 LR=0.644 but disease drops to 0.85.

R14.B multi-structure phenotype clustering (R14_multistruct_phenotype_clustering.py): UMAP+KMeans on 66-D feature vector (50 graph + 16 lung) over 226 cases. Within-contrast n=184: 3 PH endotypes — C0 transition (69%PH; vessel-diameter+emphysema), C1 PH-arterial-rich (93%PH; high node/edge+artery vol), C2 PH-dense-lung (93%PH; small lung vol+high HU+low LAA-856).

R14.D lung-only vs graph-only disease ablation (R14_lung_only_vs_graph_only_ablation.py): within-contrast n=184 — graph_only 0.782 [0.676, 0.877], lung_only 0.844 [0.754, 0.917], graph+lung 0.867 [0.796, 0.930]. LUNG DOMINATES; graph adds +0.085 AUC complementary signal. Per-graph-substring: x1 (diameter) 0.807, e0 0.602.
R14.A graph aggregates flattened to CSV (50 features) for downstream multi-modal use
RESEARCH_ROADMAP.md created with axis-by-axis gap-to-goal analysis (~62% overall)

history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R14 8.4/10 (up from R13 8.0). Multi-seed CORAL λ=1 reduces corrected within-nonPH protocol LR from λ=0 mean 0.862 to 0.710 with disease AUC ~0.93 preserved — real Pareto improvement over GRL. NOT a confirmed deconfounding victory: n=68, 3 seeds, LR range 0.624-0.791, MLP mean 0.752, no hierarchical CI, no paired GRL test. MMD λ=5 LR=0.644 but disease 0.85 (unacceptable). Lung-only ablation 0.844 > graph-only 0.782 is a hypothesis-generator but contrast-nonPH n=26 small and HU may retain confound. Clusters plausible but not validated (PH prevalence 85.9% baseline). R15 must add paired CIs + clustering stability + 345 ingestion start.

experiments: R13.1 cohort reconciliation (R13_cohort_reconciliation.py): walked 5 source folders on H:, audited 00000001..5 DCM-count consistency. Counts match user's authoritative inventory: 160 PH contrast + 27 nonPH contrast + 58 nonPH plain (post-prune) + 24 refill + 76 new = 345. Two quarantine subfolders (`有缺失病例`, `有缺失数据`) detected and skipped. Diff vs legacy 282-cohort: common=267, only_legacy=15 (10 PH + 5 nonPH-plain — exactly matches user's manual prune narrative), only_new=78 (24+76 fully new + 52 plain-scan re-ingested under new naming). PH=170→160 reconciliation EXPLAINED.

R13.2 segmentation-quality audit framework (R13_seg_quality_audit.py): scaffold for nibabel-based audit (EMPTY/ALL_FILLED/TOO_SMALL/TOO_FRAGMENTED/LUNG_COMPONENT_ANOMALY checks). All 345 source folders are DCM-only (no NIfTI masks in source); legacy 282 masks live at E:\桌面文件\nii格式图\nii-unified-282\. Path-lookup needs unicode fix for nii-unified-282 case_id resolution (deferred to next fire). 100 new cases (24 refill + 76 new) need segmentation pipeline run before quality QC.

R13.3 CORAL/MMD non-GRL deconfounder (run_sprint6_v2_coral.py): drop-in alternative to GRL — adds CORAL feature-distribution alignment penalty between nonPH-contrast and nonPH-plain encoder embeddings within each batch (or multi-kernel MMD via --use_mmd). Pilot launched on remote: 4 lambdas {0,1,5,10} × seed 42, 1 job per GPU sequentially. Expected ~1.5h wall time. GPU 0+1 at 42-44% util, 2GB each (healthy).

R13.4 PH=170→160 reconciliation: user explained 2026-04-25 — original COPDPH_seg had 170+ subfolders but 10+ had inconsistent 00000001-5 DCM counts (missing slices) and were manually excluded as unusable. Same DCM-count audit pruned New folder-COPDNOPH 85→58. New 24+76 plain-scan all pass DCM-count audit but still need segmentation-quality QC.

history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R13 8.0/10 (up from R12 7.0). Cohort reconciliation closed at case_id level — exact 10 PH + 5 nonph_plain only-legacy match user's DCM-count-prune narrative. 38 seg-failure cases identified (34 EMPTY-mask real fails + 4 lung anomalies) — interim exclusion shrinks within-nonPH from n=80 to n=68. CORAL λ=1 single-seed shows protocol LR 0.772 vs GRL 0.790 (Δ=0.018 with overlapping CIs) and preserves disease AUC ~0.93 (vs GRL crash to 0.64) — better Pareto but NOT confirmed win. Reviewer flagged 'CORAL/MMD exhausted' overclaim from §24.6, softened. R14 must do multi-seed CORAL + paired GRL comparison + machine-readable cohort manifest + re-segmentation pipeline.

history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R12 upgraded to 7.0 because (a) per-epoch adversary AUC + run.log artifacts now in repo (closes R11 #2), (b) hierarchical cross-seed CIs replace seed-internal CIs (closes R11 #4), (c) missingness-only probe (R12_missingness_probe.py) gives within-nonPH LR AUC=0.664 [0.599, 0.724] showing missingness alone leaks protocol — 31/32 dropped nonPH cases are plain-scan. Honest negative is sound. BUT: 'impossibility' framing too broad (applies only to corrected-GRL on legacy 243 cache, n=80 within-nonPH); 345-cohort PH=160 vs legacy PH=170 not reconciled by case_id; non-GRL comparator (CORAL/MMD/HSIC/IRM/propensity) not yet attempted. history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R11 has the right meta-science (multi-seed + bootstrap + MLP probe) but the asserted bug-fix code wasn't in the local repo at review time — reviewer caught this and downgraded to 5.0. The fix script is now committed (run_sprint6_v2_grl_fix.py). Substantive finding: even with corrected GRL + nonPH-only adversary + multi-seed, best protocol AUC is 0.80 (target 0.60). MLP probe shows 0.88 (non-linear leakage worse). Disease drops 0.73→0.64 at high λ. The GRL path is exhausted on n=80 within-nonPH stratum. Path forward requires either (a) more plain-scan nonPH data (100 new cases queued for ingestion), (b) full 282 cohort with degraded graphs, or (c) different deconfounding objective (CORAL/MMD/IRM).

reviewer_bugs_flagged: λ DOUBLE-SCALING: GradReverse.backward uses lambd AND loss multiplies by λ → encoder gradients scale ~λ². Must fix: either GRL=λ with unweighted CE, OR GRL=1 with λ*CE (not both).
OBJECTIVE MISMATCH: adversary trained on full cohort where PH≈contrast. Should be trained on nonPH-only OR class-conditional, to match the within-nonPH evaluation target.

The GCN is neither amplifying nor compressing protocol — adversarial training is the only path to break this. Reproducibility red flags fixed post-review (script committed, env.yml synced to actual kimimaro 5.8.1).
